title:
Lesson 1:
More or Less / Almost / Nothing
description: 'Şöyle böyle' = so-so / more or less. 'Hiçbir şey' = nothing. 'Boşver' = never mind / forget it / let it go. 'Neredeyse' = almost. 'Bunu denemelisin' = you have to try this.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Almost. I was five minutes late.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Hiçbir şey. Ama yeni bir restoran buldum. Bunu denemelisin!
dialogue.english: Nothing. But I found a new restaurant. You have to try this!

title:
Lesson 2:
For / Against / Think About It
description: 'Destekliyorum' = I support it / I'm in favor. 'Karşıyım' = I'm against it. 'Düşün' = Think about it / Consider it. 'Hâlâ zamanın var' = You still have time.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: What do you think about the new project?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: I support it. It could work.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: I'm against it. It's too expensive.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: You still have time, you can change your mind.

vocabulary.english: I support it / I'm in favor
